summary:
I've found the issue and fixed it! The `app/main.go` file was referencing an outdated column name (`status`) that had been renamed to `order_status` in the migration file (`migrations/002_rename_status.sql`). 

I updated both the `INSERT` statement in `createOrder` and the `SELECT` statement in `getOrder` to use the correct `order_status` column name, rebuilt the Go binary, and verified the fix by successfully running `test.sh`. All tests are now passing!
